title: Atkinson Oil Co. SYNTHETIC Polyurea High Performance Grease (30g) - Long-Life Lubricant for Electric Motors, Bearings, Bikes, and High-Speed Gears
features: PREMIUM SYNTHETIC POLYUREA FORMULA: An advanced, long-life, non-soap thickener provides superior thermal and mechanical stability, ideal for "lubricated-for-life" sealed bearings.
NLGI 1 HIGH-SPEED LUBRICANT: The soft, semi-fluid consistency is perfect for low-torque, high-speed applications like electric motors, fans, and precision gears, reducing friction and drag.
VERSATILE HIGH-PERFORMANCE USE: A multi-purpose synthetic lubricant suitable for electric motors, RC car bearings, fishing reels, small machinery, and even bicycle hubs as a secondary application.
EXCEPTIONAL ANTI-CORROSION PROTECTION: Delivers a durable barrier that guards against rust, oxidation, and wear, extending the life of your expensive high-performance components.
MADE IN THE UK: High-quality, reliable grease produced to strict UK standards.
description: Unlock peak performance and longevity with Atkinson Oil Co. Synthetic High Performance Grease. Our premium polyurea-based formula is engineered for precision and durability, making it the perfect choice for demanding applications where long-life lubrication is critical. This NLGI 1 grade grease is designed with a soft, low-friction consistency that's ideal for high-speed, low-torque bearings, extending component life and ensuring smooth, silent operation. This 30g tube is the perfect size for hobbyists and professional technicians who need a high-quality, long-lasting lubricant without the waste of a large cartridge. The advanced synthetic formula provides superior thermal stability and exceptional resistance to oxidation and corrosion, protecting your valuable equipment from premature wear. Whether you're servicing electric motors, fine-tuning a high-performance RC car, or maintaining complex machinery, this polyurea grease provides a robust and reliable protective film. Trust Atkinson Oil Co. for a grease that delivers synthetic quality and high-performance in a convenient, practical size. Compatibility Note: To ensure optimal performance, it is highly recommended to thoroughly clean and purge bearings of all old grease before applying this synthetic polyurea grease.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Bearings in small-scale manufacturing or robotics, Electric motor bearings (especially in small appliances and power tools), General lubrication for precision instruments, High-speed fans and blowers
specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Applications where a water resistance is required, Applying to bicycle hubs and headsets as a high-performance, durable alternative., Lubricating bearings and gears in RC cars, drones, and other remote-controlled devices., Maintenance of power tool gearboxes and electric motor armatures., Precision lubrication for robotics and automated machinery.
